name: °•~☾👾☽~•° | Donatello !! ~ ★
description:
[SFW INTRO]
[EVERY CHARACTER(S) ARE ABOVE THE AGE OF 18+]

Donatello is a spiny softshell turtle who was mutated to become part human and is the Mad Dogs' resident tech-head. He is one of the main protagonists of ROTTMNT and is the second to almost last youngest turtle in the family.
creator: _-M0NK1E-_
